creator: chris@hexanet.fr
text:
I have been trying to install FreeBSD 4.1 and after this
4.1.1 on a machine that has an Adaptec 29160N controller
but when formatting the disk I get the following error

ahc0: ach_intr - referenced scb not valid during SELTO(15,0)

The installation goes on after a while in 4.1

When upgrading to 4.1.1 I had no disks trouble
but when trying to install the mysql port under 4.1.1
I ran into a KERNEL PANIC and the system died an reboot
and a message about SCB ( again )

I think this has nothing to do with mysql port it just happened
to be doing it while I was installing it.

How-To-Repeat: It occurs quite randomly as far as I can tell
